## Summary
Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] No new `any` types introduced
- [ ] Machine-readable specs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Generated artifacts regenerated (if applicable)
- [ ] Diagnostics pass clean (if applicable)

## Impact Analysis
If this change affects specs or capabilities, paste the output of `sysmara impact <target>`.
